plan_metadata.name: Weather Agent OpenAI js Remote Debug

steps.description: Click on the "Custom Engine Agent" option in the "New Project" dropdown menu to select it.
Click on the dropdown menu option titled "Weather Agent" under the "App Features Using Microsoft 365 Agents SDK" window.
Click the "OpenAI" option in the "Select a service to access LLMs" dropdown within the "Service for Large Language Model (LLM)" dialog in Visual Studio Code.
Type 'fake' into the 'OpenAI Key' input field in the pop-up dialog at the top of the Visual Studio Code window in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension.
Press the Enter key to confirm the AI key input in the "OpenAI Key" dialog within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "JavaScript" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension interface in Visual Studio Code.

Click the "Default folder" option under the "Choose the folder where your project root will be located" dropdown in the Workspace Folder dialog. Ensure the selected folder path is "/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects".
